languages.text: "Я видел{mf||а} итог: на военном совете Себериан не слушает свиту, полагаясь лишь на свой меч".

traits.locale_text: "Я видел{mf||а} итог: на военном совете Себериан не слушает свиту, полагаясь лишь на свой меч".

languages.text: "I have seen how this ends: at the war council, Seberian does not listen to his retinue, relying only on his sword."
languages.original_text: "Я видел{mf||а} итог: на военном совете Себериан не слушает свиту, полагаясь лишь на свой меч".

traits.locale_text: "I have seen how this ends: at the war council, Seberian does not listen to his retinue, relying only on his sword."
"I have seen how this ends: at the war council, Seberian does not listen to his retinue, relying only on his sword."
"I have seen how this ends: at the war council, Seberian does not listen to his retinue, relying only on his sword."

languages.text: “我已见证过这一切的结局。在作战会议上，塞贝里安谁的劝都不听，只相信他手里那把剑。”
languages.original_text: "I have seen how this ends: at the war council, Seberian does not listen to his retinue, relying only on his sword."

traits.locale_text: “我已见证过这一切的结局。在作战会议上，塞贝里安谁的劝都不听，只相信他手里那把剑。”

languages.text: « Je sais comment toute cette histoire va finir, je l'ai vu : au conseil de guerre, Seberian n'écoute pas son entourage et s'en remet entièrement à son épée. »
languages.original_text: "I have seen how this ends: at the war council, Seberian does not listen to his retinue, relying only on his sword."

traits.locale_text: « Je sais comment toute cette histoire va finir, je l'ai vu : au conseil de guerre, Seberian n'écoute pas son entourage et s'en remet entièrement à son épée. »

languages.text: "Bu meselenin nasıl sonuçlandığını gördüm. Savaş konseyinde Seberian maiyetini dinlemiyor, sadece kılıcına güveniyor."
languages.original_text: "I have seen how this ends: at the war council, Seberian does not listen to his retinue, relying only on his sword."

traits.locale_text: "Bu meselenin nasıl sonuçlandığını gördüm. Savaş konseyinde Seberian maiyetini dinlemiyor, sadece kılıcına güveniyor."

languages.text: «He visto cómo acaba esto: en el consejo de guerra, Seberian se niega a escuchar a su séquito y confía únicamente en su espada».
languages.original_text: "I have seen how this ends: at the war council, Seberian does not listen to his retinue, relying only on his sword."

traits.locale_text: «He visto cómo acaba esto: en el consejo de guerra, Seberian se niega a escuchar a su séquito y confía únicamente en su espada».

languages.text: "Ich habe gesehen, wie das hier endet: Seberian hört im Kriegsrat nicht auf sein Gefolge, sondern verlässt sich allein auf sein Schwert."
languages.original_text: "I have seen how this ends: at the war council, Seberian does not listen to his retinue, relying only on his sword."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe gesehen, wie das hier endet: Seberian hört im Kriegsrat nicht auf sein Gefolge, sondern verlässt sich allein auf sein Schwert."

languages.text: 「この戦いの結末は知っている。シベリアは側近の意見を聞かず、剣のみを頼りにする。」
languages.original_text: "I have seen how this ends: at the war council, Seberian does not listen to his retinue, relying only on his sword."

traits.locale_text: 「この戦いの結末は知っている。シベリアは側近の意見を聞かず、剣のみを頼りにする。」
